responses: Hello! I am your Finance Advisor 💰 How can I help you today?
Hi there! Ask me anything about savings, investment or budgeting.
Try the 50-30-20 rule: Needs 50%, Wants 30%, Savings 20%.
Start automatic savings every month and avoid impulse spending.
List income and expenses first, then allocate savings before spending.
Track daily expenses using the Expense Tracker module.
You can invest in Mutual Funds, Fixed Deposits, or Stocks depending on risk level.
Start SIP investment for long-term wealth creation.
Track expenses daily and remove unnecessary subscriptions.
Check Expense Tracker to analyze your spending habits.
Happy to help with your finances!
